narrative:
Cols 79-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,407 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
